creator: FreeBSD@ShaneWare.Biz
text:
Personally I have only had success by adding -L/usr/local/llvm37/lib -lomp - choosing either -liomp5 or -lgomp also works.

clang37 -fopenmp -L/usr/local/llvm37/lib -lomp omp.c

See http://blog.llvm.org/2015/05/openmp-support_22.html


Brooks - something for the todo list?? allow USE=compiler:openmp to recognize clang37 as valid if CC=clang37 CXX=clang++37 are set or pick clang37 over gcc?
